macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Closes Up 1.15% Amid US-Iran Talks Boost
items.summary: The S&P 500 Index rose 1.15% on Monday, intersecting its 200-day moving average after President Trump's announcement of productive US-Iran talks easing tensions. The index tested support between 6500-6575 and faces resistance at 6620 within a declining trend channel.[1]

items.title: Stock Futures Slip as US-Iran Resolution Hopes Fade
items.summary: US stock futures declined in early Tuesday trading, with Nasdaq 100 futures down 0.17%, S&P 500 futures down 0.23%, and Dow Jones futures down 0.28%, as optimism over US-Iran talks wanes.[3]

items.title: S&P 500 Futures Prediction Markets Show Mixed Outlook
items.summary: Prediction markets on Robinhood indicate expectations for Jun-26 S&P 500 futures around 6600-6650 on March 24, with contracts above 6550 trading at 81¢ and above 6650 at 57¢.[2]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Above $70K After Trump Pauses Iran Strikes
items.summary: Bitcoin held strong above $70,000 following Donald Trump's announcement of a 5-day pause on strikes against Iran, easing geopolitical fears and sparking a risk-on rally in crypto markets with capital rotating from gold to risk assets.

items.title: Clarity Act Sparks Backlash with Stablecoin Yield Limits
items.summary: The CLARITY Act has drawn massive criticism from crypto investors and institutions after imposing strict limits on stablecoin rewards, including a ban on yields from simply holding balances, aiming to prevent them from resembling bank deposits.

items.title: BlackRock Goes All-In on Crypto with 11 Coins
items.summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink announced major investments in 11 cryptocurrencies, signaling strong institutional commitment amid a bullish macro backdrop.

items.title: SWIFT Adopts Crypto for Cross-Border Payments with 25+ Banks
items.summary: SWIFT confirmed that over 25 banks will go live by June using cryptocurrency for 24/7 cross-border payments, marking a significant step in traditional finance integration.

items.title: Crypto Market Rebound: BTC +29%, ETH +38%, XRP +16%
items.summary: Major cryptocurrencies saw strong gains with Bitcoin up 29%, Ethereum up 38%, and XRP up 16% amid market rebound following de-escalation signals from Trump-Iran talks.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Oracle Launches AI Customer Excellence Centre in Sydney
items.summary: Oracle announced the opening of its AI Customer Excellence Centre in Sydney to serve as a regional hub for organizations across Australia and Oceania to adopt agentic AI, AI-powered analytics, generative AI, and machine learning solutions.

items.title: NIST and Anthropic Highlight Tool to Address AI Risks
items.summary: NIST and Anthropic stakeholders presented a tool designed to help address artificial intelligence risks and safety concerns.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Super with Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Architecture
items.summary: NVIDIA announced Nemotron 3 Super, a 120B hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE model with 12B active parameters, 1M context window, and 2.2x throughput improvements over comparable models.

items.title: Mamba 3 Open-Source Framework Released to Improve Upon Transformer Architecture
items.summary: Mamba 3, an open-source framework, has been released with enhancements aimed at increasing efficiency and performance in machine learning tasks, potentially reshaping future AI applications.

items.title: Post-Training Methods Evolve: GRPO, DAPO, RLVR Replace RLHF
items.summary: New post-training techniques including GRPO, DAPO, and RLVR have emerged as the dominant post-training stack, replacing traditional RLHF methods in 2026.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Officially Announced
items.summary: Ubisoft has officially announced Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, one of the industry's worst-kept secrets, alongside updates like a 60fps patch for AC Unity on PS5 and Xbox Series, and confirmation that multiplayer Project Invictus is still in development.

items.title: Minecraft Dungeons 2 Announced for 2026 Launch
items.summary: Developer Double Eleven and Microsoft suddenly announced Minecraft Dungeons 2, a sequel to the 2020 dungeon crawler spinoff, set for release in 2026 on PC, PS5, Switch/Switch 2, and Xbox Series S|X.

items.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition Switch 2 Upgrade Shadowdropped
items.summary: Nintendo shadowdropped a $5 Switch 2 upgrade for Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition, enhancing it to 4K60fps with improved textures and load times; a physical edition follows on April 16th.

items.title: Metal Gear Solid Master Collection Volume 2 Updates and Delistings
items.summary: Konami released a final 3.0 update for MGS Master Collection Volume 1 with Switch 2 upgrades including 1080p60fps for MGS2/MGS3, but delisted Metal Gear Solid 4 and Peace Walker ahead of their modern release.

items.title: Hellraiser: Revival ESRB Rating Reveals Switch 2 Port
items.summary: Saber Interactive’s Hellraiser: Revival received an ESRB rating, signaling an imminent launch and revealing an unannounced Nintendo Switch 2 port.

items.title: Xbox Partner Preview Set for March 26 with 2026 Third-Party Games
items.summary: Xbox Partner Preview returns on March 26, spotlighting third-party titles like Stranger Than Heaven and STALKER 2 coming to Xbox and Game Pass in 2026.

items.title: This Week's Key Releases: Life is Strange: Reunion and More
items.summary: Major releases this week include Life is Strange: Reunion and its Twin Pack on March 26, alongside Neopets Mega Mini Games Collection, Screamer, and Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection on March 27; Switch 2 versions of Super Mario Bros. Wonder and Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. also launch March 26.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Elon Musk Launches Terafab Chip Factory in Texas
items.summary: Elon Musk announced Terafab, a $20 billion-plus semiconductor fab in Austin, Texas, jointly developed by Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI to produce custom chips for EVs, robots, and computing, addressing global chip shortages.

items.title: Samsung Rolls Out AirDrop Support via Quick Share on Galaxy S26 Series
items.summary: Samsung is introducing AirDrop-like file sharing support over Quick Share, starting with the Galaxy S26 series, to enhance cross-device compatibility.

items.title: Microsoft Releases Emergency Windows Update
items.summary: Microsoft issued an emergency patch to resolve major issues impacting Windows users following a recent problematic update rollout.

items.title: Apple's M5 Pro and M5 Max Chips Feature Advanced 3D Packaging
items.summary: Apple's upcoming M5 Pro and M5 Max chips use vertically stacked dies with 3D packaging for superior performance, as revealed by an Apple employee.

items.title: Apple Prepares iOS 26.4 Launch with New Features
items.summary: Apple is set to release iOS 26.4 next week, featuring AI-powered playlist playground, urgent reminders, and keyboard improvements.

items.title: SpaceX Launches Additional Starlink Satellites in March
items.summary: SpaceX deployed 83 Starlink satellites this March, pushing the constellation beyond 6,700 to boost global internet access in remote areas.
